Complete Markdown Test

This document tests all major HTML to Markdown conversions.

Text Formatting

We have bold, italic, inline code, and links.

Lists

  • Unordered item 1
  • Unordered item 2 with bold
  1. Ordered item 1
  2. Ordered item 2

Code

function example() {
  return "code block";
}

Blockquote

A wise quote about testing.

Special Characters

Ampersand: &, Less than: <, Greater than: >, Quote: "

Unicode: — em dash, © copyright

Line with
break in middle.

After horizontal rule.
